system.description: After you use Your Best Self, you may invite the alternate version of yourself to stay in this reality indefinitely. Make them an offer and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: this alternate version of yourself accepts the deal and remains as a new Relationship with 3 Connection and a Connection Bonus related to the description you gave for them. Assign them to another player to play. Add 1 Loose End to the total count at the beginning of every Mission for as long as they remain here. They can leave this Reality at any time.
outcomes.every3rd3:
you may
increase your starting Connection
by 1 (to a maximum of 9).
outcomes.failure:
they remain. You return
to where they came from. Your player
now plays the new version of you.
Depending on how similar they are
you might: adjust your Work/Life
Balance choices; swap out Anomaly
Abilities for the ones you would have
received with different behavior;
move Relationships up and down
equivalently to how well this version
connects to people; or any other
details you feel necessary to adjust.

answer1.text: A large community of like- minded acquaintances.

answer2.text: A small group of friends that truly understands each other.
